text: The onboarding flow is really confusing. I spent 45 minutes just trying to connect my first integration and gave up.
Billing page doesn't show invoice history for the last 3 months. This is a major blocker for our finance team's monthly reconciliation.
Would really love a bulk import feature for contacts. We have about 5000 records to migrate and manual entry isn't realistic.
The API rate limit documentation says 100 req/min but the actual limit seems to be 50. Took us a day to debug this.
Performance is noticeably better after the last update. Pages load much faster and the dashboard feels snappy now.
Onboarding is confusing — couldn't figure out how to set up the first workflow without watching a YouTube tutorial.
The export to CSV feature is broken. It downloads an empty file every time I try.
Please add SSO support. Our IT policy requires it and we can't roll this out company-wide without it.
